## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] Tested manually in the Extension Development Host (F5)
- [ ] New settings added to `package.json` `contributes.configuration`
- [ ] New tools documented in the README Agent Tools table
- [ ] No hardcoded colors — uses `var(--vscode-*)` CSS tokens
- [ ] No `onclick` attributes in HTML/JS — uses `addEventListener`
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json` (if applicable)
